name: lifeguard shack
hints: The lifeguard shack has a small ham radio - an essential item for the endgame.
GET RADIO - you need it to transmit the bomb deactivation code from the antenna shed.
GET RADIO (the small ham radio) and bring it to the antenna shed (room 13). EAST returns to the beach (room 20).
notes: Lifeguard shack on the beach. Contains the small ham radio needed for the endgame TRANSMIT command in the antenna shed (room 13). EAST returns to the beach (room 20).
